title: validate_stmt and collect_regex_patterns duplicate walk
description: validate_stmt() and collect_regex_patterns() in lib.rs implement an almost identical manual loop: has_regex_tag bool, clause_start index, i index, with identical Block/TestList recursion structure (lib.rs:175-236 and 280-320). The only difference is the action taken when a clause ends at a Block. This means any future Sieve extension that adds a new match type or clause-scoping rule must update both functions. The two should be unified into a single form-tree walker that accepts a callback or visitor for the per-clause action.
